name: analytics.costByService
description: Query cost breakdown by service from analytics warehouse. Shows total cost, token usage, and average cost per run for each service (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.).

start_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results from this date forward

end_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results up to this date

service_name.description: Optional filter to show costs for a specific service only

records.description: List of cost records by service

service_name.description: Name of the LLM service (e.g., openai, anthropic)

total_cost_usd.description: Total cost in USD for this service

total_tokens.description: Total tokens used by this service

avg_cost_per_run.description: Average cost per run for this service

run_count.description: Number of runs using this service
